technical_agent.name: Technical Analysis Agent
technical_agent.description: Fetches previous day's close, volume, 52-week high/low via yfinance; calculates 14-day RSI, 50-day MA, 200-day MA; identifies support/resistance levels and generates price action + momentum summary per ticker

sentiment_agent.name: Sentiment Analysis Agent
sentiment_agent.description: Searches for the top 3 recent headlines per ticker, analyzes market mood (Bullish/Bearish/Neutral), identifies catalysts (earnings, product launches, regulatory news), and produces a vibe check summary

manager_agent.name: Stock Analysis Coordinator
manager_agent.description: Orchestrates the daily analysis pipeline - routes watchlist tickers to sub-agents, aggregates technical + sentiment results into a comparative color-coded HTML report, and sends the final email via Gmail

qa_agent.name: Dashboard Q&A Agent
qa_agent.description: Handles on-demand stock questions from the web dashboard - provides real-time comparative analysis, answers ad-hoc queries about watchlist performance, and delivers instant insights

daily_morning_report.message: Run the daily stock analysis pipeline for the configured watchlist tickers and send the report email.
